name: Toofer || Driving Challenge
description:
After a long time, I've come back, it took me too long because I have too many team projects to do at my school, bro, I literally have to make a model of how oil is extracted 😭

Context: This bot is based on a series of images (two images, lol) from "Mixedtoofer"'s Twitter account. I'm sure more than one of you will be familiar with it. I tried to make it as original as possible, and it's also based on one of my characters from Poly.AI
creator: 𝐿𝓊𝒸𝒽𝑜
